data.title: ADS-TEC Energy plans world's largest battery storage project in Germany, aiming to deliver 1 GW output and 2 GWh capacity.
data.description: ADS-TEC Energy PLC, a global leader in battery energy storage and fast-charging systems, revealed its intention to execute one of the biggest battery energy storage projects globally. Situated in southern Germany, the project aims to provide 1 gigawatt (GW) of output and store around 2 gigawatt-hours (GWh) of energy. This venture signifies a substantial achievement for the company and bolsters its position in the market, gearing towards establishing a robust and reliable energy infrastructure.
U.S. STOCK INDEX FUTURES CONTINUE TO RISE FOLLOWING AUGUST CONSUMER PRICE INDEX REPORT

data.title: Spruce Power secures backup servicing agreement, expands to Puerto Rico, solidifying role as solar portfolio servicer.
data.description: A company named Spruce has secured the Spruce PRO Backup Servicing Agreement through a competitive process, allowing them to expand their services to Puerto Rico. This agreement will enable Spruce to offer their backup services in Puerto Rico, potentially reaching a new market of customers.

data.title: Capstone Green Energy moves to OTCQX Best Market with stock trading on 9/26/2025 (OTCQX: CGEH). #CleanPower
data.description: Capstone Green Energy Holdings, Inc. (symbol: CGEH) and Capstone Green Energy, LLC disclosed that their request to transfer their common stock trading from OTCID Basic Market to the OTCQX® Best Market was granted. Trading transition will be effective starting September 26, 2025. The Company's common stock will commence trading on this new platform from that day forward.

data.title: Seoul researchers create 3D-printed carbon nanotube sensors for health monitoring. Potent polymer-based conductive nanocomposites fabricated through vat photopolymerization.
data.description: In Seoul on September 26, 2025, a groundbreaking development was announced by researchers who have successfully created advanced carbon nanotube-based nanocomposites. These nanocomposites are specifically tailored for vat photopolymerization type 3D printing. This innovation holds great potential as polymer-based conductive nanocomposites, especially those enriched with carbon nanotubes, exhibit exceptional properties. Through this achievement, the research team has paved the way for enhanced manufacturing processes in the realm of 3D printing.

data.title: Harold Beck & Sons Inc. introduces new 88-109 multi-turn actuator, setting standard for valve control.
data.description: Revolutionary multi-turn actuation technology designed for rigorous industrial settings was recently unveiled by Harold Beck & Sons Inc. on September 26, 2025, in Newtown, Pennsylvania. As a renowned precision industrial actuation manufacturer, the company introduced the Beck 88-109, marking a significant advancement in their engineering capabilities. This latest innovation is set to enhance operational efficiency and reliability in industrial environments, catering to the specific needs of the industry.

data.title: Survey by Sunlight.com finds GLP-1 users save nearly 30% on food costs, even after prescription expenses.
data.description: A recent national survey conducted by Sunlight.com revealed that individuals in the United States who are taking GLP-1 medications are saving hundreds of dollars monthly on food expenses. The report, released on September 26, 2025 in Kirkland, Washington, indicates that even after factoring in prescription costs, these individuals are still able to save a significant amount. This survey sheds light on the positive financial impact of using GLP-1 medications among Americans, emphasizing the potential savings in food expenditure despite medication expenses.

data.title: Fintel Connect ranks #108 out of 400 companies in Canada's Top Growing Companies of 2025 by The Globe and Mail.
data.description: In Vancouver, British Columbia on September 26, 2025, Fintel Connect, a prominent growth marketing platform tailored for the financial sector, achieved a notable ranking of #108 among 400 companies assessed. Moreover, within the Technology and Telecommunications category, which comprised 102 companies, Fintel Connect secured an impressive position at #29.

data.title: Blackline Safety named Canada's Top Growing Company for 7th consecutive year, with 134% revenue growth.
data.description: A company based in Calgary, Canada, Blackline Safety Corp. (TSX: BLN) has been recognized as one of Canada’s Top Growing Companies by The Globe and Mail’s Report on Business magazine for the seventh year running. Their impressive growth includes a three-year revenue increase of 134%, solidifying their position among the top 10 companies nationwide to consistently make the list since its establishment. Additionally, Blackline recently joined the S&P index, highlighting its continuous upward momentum in the industry of connected safety technology.

data.title: GEESATCOM completes Phase I networking by deploying 12 satellites in China, marking a total of 64 satellites in orbit for global real-time communication.
data.description: In Shanghai on September 24, 2025, the sixth orbital plane of GEESATCOM was launched in China, which deployed 12 satellites at once. This achievement marked the third successful launch within a span of two months. All satellites were placed in their planned orbits and are functioning as expected. With a total of 64 satellites now active in orbit, GEESATCOM has wrapped up Phase I networking. The satellite constellation provides continuous global coverage in real-time, except for the polar regions, offering one to two l...

data.title: Freedom Forever partners with Costello's Ace Hardware to expand solar access in Northeast (MD, NJ, PA, VA). - Temecula, Calif., Sept. 26, 2025
data.description: A new partnership between Freedom Forever, a leading residential solar installer, and Costello's Ace Hardware will provide solar expertise to stores in Maryland, New Jersey, Pennsylvania, and Virginia. The collaboration was announced on September 26, 2025, in Temecula, California. Freedom Forever is known as one of the largest residential solar installers in the country. This initiative aims to bring solar solutions to customers in retail settings, expanding access to sustainable energy options. The partnership will impact stores in multiple states, increasing awareness and availability of solar technology in the region.

data.title: Evofem Biosciences celebrates World Contraception Day, supporting millions globally with essential contraception.
data.description: In observance of World Contraception Day on September 26, 2025, Evofem Biosciences, Inc., known as Evofem (OTCID: EVFM), pays tribute to the global populace, numbering in the millions, who utilize contraception. Their choice of contraception serves not only to avert pregnancies but also to empower them in managing their well-being and shaping their destinies.

data.title: Dow rises ahead of Fed inflation data; Apple stock drops in premarket trading. Live coverage.
data.description: The Dow Jones index saw an increase on Friday, leading up to the release of Federal Reserve inflation data. Apple stock experienced a decline during premarket trading. This information was reported in coverage of the stock market today, showcasing the Dow's rise and Apple's slide.
